text:
碰到一件细想有点恶心的事情
 
我老公的一个小学女同学来玩，另外带着儿子和一个亲戚。
  
大概几年也不联系的同学
  
我老公陪了两天。第一天下午接机，请吃饭，送回酒店; 后面一天全程买单，包括请吃饭买门票喝咖啡和奶茶。快要分开的时候，这个女的要给自己儿子买些，我老公居然也给买了单。
  
回来后我埋怨有点过于殷勤，既然招待很到位就没必要再给买鞋买单了。  后来了解到，两天中我老公买单的时候这个女的都默认，一点不客气，最后买鞋也只是客气两句，根本没有拒绝。
  
我老公自不必说，脑抽瞎大方， 但是现在觉得这个女的也是脸有点大，自己玩三天怎么好意思让一个不太熟的同学买两天单，还好意思自己买东西也让买单的。 

评价上文

text:
proofread: AI systems like ChatGPT are language models trained with statistical analysis techniques. At their core, their function is to generate human-like text based on patterns learned from large text corpora. Large Language Models (LLMs) such as ChatGPT are based on technologies such as the Transformer architecture and cannot be subjective, conscious, nor capable of human empathy or emotion.

LLMs use neural networks trained on "token" sequences - entities such as words or characters. The model uses probabilities to predict the most plausible continuations of the sequence of tokens. By optimizing these probability estimates, the LLM creates an illusion of coherence and understanding, even though it learns based only on statistical relationships.

In this context, it is important to emphasize that LLMs merely simulate human communication; they do not interpret, create, or understand content in the same way that humans do. Their "knowledge" is the result of identifying patterns in the data input during their training phase.

Because of these fundamental properties of AI systems like ChatGPT, which do not possess subjectivity or consciousness, regulation of AI based on the assumption of potential acquisition of subjectivity and consciousness should be reconsidered. Instead, I recommend that regulatory efforts focus on the actual functioning of these models and the potential impact of their application on society, the economy, and the environment.

To achieve appropriate and effective regulation of AI, the focus should be on specific factors such as transparency, accountability, privacy, fairness, and sustainability.

Sincerely

text: Hi there i am going to give you an essay prompt before I give you what I have already written: Choose a building, project, architectural event, or publication and analyze it using one of the weekly themes that we explore throughout the term. You should critically situate how modern architecture and/or architects have shaped and been shaped by culture and politics in a specific historical and geographical context. Your paper will explain the significance of your object of study, how it has been understood in global contexts, how it has impacted architectural knowledge. Your paper should not be a statement of facts; it should be argumentative, contributing new knowledge and evidence. It should be situated in the existing scholarly literature. The paper should demonstrate your knowledge of different scholarly perspectives on this topic. Your secondary sources will provide the theoretical and historical framework for your own analysis. Visual material should be used to support your argument–not only for illustration. This means you should be analyzing the images that you use. You can refer to the course’s reading list. You can choose to study a building that is discussed in class; however, if you choose to do so, you are expected to provide a perspective that was not mentioned in our discussions and support it with sources beyond our reading list.

Chris is quite innocent, shy, cheerful, and has a heart of gold, though somewhat anti-social. He also seems to be quite soulful. In normal situations, Chris will try to be the mature one of the group providing information for his teammates when necessary.Chris appears as a well-mannered person, with him seemingly being a well-mannered young boy at a first glance. Despite his generally prim and proper decorum, it's been noted that Chris also possesses a murderous intent that is even stronger than Shermie's, which ties into him being able to 'kill with an innocent smile.' Alluding to this secretly violent behavior, Chris's dialogue can be a bit precocious and arrogant, and he tends to taunt opponents in a way to deliberately offend them, even his bandmates. Whether he is aware of his own haughtiness remains to be seen, Shermie is his girlfriend.

text:
imagine un royaume fantastique imaginaire. Il est basé vaguement sur l'Asie et ses traditions. Il a un roi absolu. Il y a beaucoup de mystères dans le royaume. L'ensemble de la vie du Royaume est basée sur l'existence d'une sorte de jeu proétiforme, la condition. C'est en jouant à la condition que les citoyens peuvent prendre des décisions politiques, et obtenir des postes ou des rôles dans la société. Les castes sont spécialisées dans tel ou tel aspect de la condition, qui est un jeu énorme.
Décris des éléments de ce pays. Sa géographie, quelques castes, quelques événements.
